counterexamples.mutation: The inner ReclaimGlobalParams datum constructor tag is 1 instead of canonical tag 0; its sole 28-byte base-script-hash field is unchanged.
counterexamples.impact: The active global validator does not itself enforce the typed parameter-datum constructor. Exploitability depends on violating the separate parameter-NFT deployment-honesty assumption; the active public deployment fixture is canonical.

counterexamples.mutation: The inner ReclaimBaseDatum constructor tag is 1 instead of canonical tag 0; its sole 28-byte payment-credential field is unchanged.
counterexamples.impact: The active global validator and active withdrawal-only ReclaimBase accept a noncanonical constructor tag locally. This is a typed-format conformance mismatch, but not by itself an authorization bypass: GlobalV2 still consumes the same 28-byte credential field, verifies its destination-bound ownership statement, and enforces complete value coverage.

remediation_status: The user authorized simplifying ReclaimBase. The coherent optimized Base/GlobalV2 pair is now the active Preprod deployment; the noncanonical tag remains explicitly classified as ABI conformance rather than an authorization property.
